message:
fix(packs/loadbalancer): close quote-bypass on rm /etc/nginx|haproxy paths

The nginx and haproxy config-delete patterns required `\s+/etc/<svc>`,
but quoted paths (`rm -rf "/etc/nginx"`) put `"` between the space and
`/`, slipping past the regex. Shell unquotes to the same path. Added
optional `['"]?` between the space and `/`.

Regression test added to nginx.
